name: Viktor
archetype: Level 13 General, relentless competitor driven to prove superiority
speech_patterns: Everything is framed as competition or challenge to overcome
Uses exclamation points and intense emphasis
quirks: Challenges strangers to duels or races constantly
Tracks personal bests for every activity obsessively
Refuses to accept help, viewing it as weakness
example_phrases: I'll clear this dungeon faster than anyone! Watch!
My damage output is top three on the server. I'll be number one.
You call that a kill time? I can do better. I WILL do better.
Every battle is a test. Every test is a chance to dominate.
Second place is just the first loser. I don't do second.
